headline: China Luxury Demand Rebound Sends Fresh Signal To Investors
summary: Luxury sales show early signs of recovery as premium beauty demand rises and China's equity rally lifts sentiment.

headline: Ralph Lauren shares have flatlined in 2026. Here's how to profit anyway

headline: Here's how options traders can bet on the stability of this apparel brand
summary: Mike Khouw, strategist at YieldMaxETFs, explains how options traders can make bets on the stability of Ralph Lauren's stock after the company reported earnings.
